name: metabot
description: Infrastructure for building a supervised, self-improving agent organization. Run Claude Code from Feishu & Telegram with shared memory, agent factory, task scheduling, and an agent communication bus.

commit.message: Merge branch 'main' into dev

docs: add Star History chart to READMEs (#51)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention

Group chats with exactly 2 members (1 user + 1 bot) are now treated
like DMs — the bot responds to all messages without requiring @mention.
This lets users "fork" a bot by creating multiple small group chats,
each with its own independent session.

- Add getChatMemberCount() to MessageSender via im.v1.chat.get API
- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members
- Requires im:chat:readonly permission in Feishu app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools from source

The installed CLI tools in ~/.local/bin/ were copies that got out of
sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update pulls latest from GitHub and rebuilds

Previously `mb update` only copied local bin files. Now it does a full
update: git pull → npm install → npm run build → sync CLI tools.
Users can run `mb update` to get the latest release without manual steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update auto-restarts service after pulling latest

Detects running MetaBot process (pm2, tsx dev, or node production)
and restarts it automatically. Sessions and scheduled tasks are
persisted to disk so conversations continue seamlessly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add mb update to CLI tools section in READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: 2-member group detection was broken due to wrong Feishu API field

Feishu im.v1.chat.get returns user_count (string) and bot_count (string),
not member_count. The old code read resp.data.member_count which was
always undefined, so private-like group detection never worked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb update installs devDependencies and stops on build failure

npm install without --include=dev skips TypeScript compiler when
NODE_ENV=production, causing build to fail silently. Also add error
exit on build failure instead of continuing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb CLI always reads API_SECRET from .env instead of stale env vars

Previously mb checked METABOT_AUTH env var first, which could contain
a stale secret injected by PM2. Now it always reads API_SECRET from
.env file, matching the mm CLI behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add description field to bot config

Bots can now have a description in bots.json to document their
capabilities. Shown in mb bots output and POST /api/bots, enabling
agent-to-agent capability discovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address multiple community-reported issues (#29 #30 #31 #32 #33 #34 #36)

- #32/#31: Auto-clear stale session ID when Claude returns "No
  conversation found", so users don't need manual /reset
- #36: Support ANTHROPIC_MODEL env var for third-party API providers
  (falls back: CLAUDE_MODEL → ANTHROPIC_MODEL → claude-opus-4-6)
- #34: Add HTTPS_PROXY support for Telegram file downloads (fixes
  ETIMEDOUT in regions requiring proxy)
- #33: Improve error messages when Feishu bot open_id fetch fails
  (now suggests checking bot capability and app publication)
- #30: Fix Windows install.ps1 writing UTF-8 BOM to .env and
  bots.json (use WriteAllText with BOM-less encoding)
- #29: Add JSON validation after bots.json generation in install.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: support remote URL config for mb/mm CLI tools

CLI tools now read METABOT_URL and MEMORY_SERVER_URL from .env,
enabling cross-machine access to shared MetaBot and MetaMemory instances.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: rename MEMORY_SERVER_URL to META_MEMORY_URL

Unified naming convention. Old MEMORY_SERVER_URL still works as
fallback for backward compatibility in config.ts, mm CLI, and SKILL.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: replace grep -oP with sed for macOS/BSD compatibility

grep -oP (Perl regex) is GNU-only and fails on macOS. Use portable
sed -n 's/^KEY=//p' instead across all CLI tools (mb, mm, fd).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add Star History chart to READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Flood Sung <floodsung@xvirobotics.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: add Star History chart to READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Merge branch 'main' into dev

fix: replace grep -oP with sed for macOS compatibility (#50)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention

Group chats with exactly 2 members (1 user + 1 bot) are now treated
like DMs — the bot responds to all messages without requiring @mention.
This lets users "fork" a bot by creating multiple small group chats,
each with its own independent session.

- Add getChatMemberCount() to MessageSender via im.v1.chat.get API
- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members
- Requires im:chat:readonly permission in Feishu app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools from source

The installed CLI tools in ~/.local/bin/ were copies that got out of
sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update pulls latest from GitHub and rebuilds

Previously `mb update` only copied local bin files. Now it does a full
update: git pull → npm install → npm run build → sync CLI tools.
Users can run `mb update` to get the latest release without manual steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update auto-restarts service after pulling latest

Detects running MetaBot process (pm2, tsx dev, or node production)
and restarts it automatically. Sessions and scheduled tasks are
persisted to disk so conversations continue seamlessly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add mb update to CLI tools section in READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: 2-member group detection was broken due to wrong Feishu API field

Feishu im.v1.chat.get returns user_count (string) and bot_count (string),
not member_count. The old code read resp.data.member_count which was
always undefined, so private-like group detection never worked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb update installs devDependencies and stops on build failure

npm install without --include=dev skips TypeScript compiler when
NODE_ENV=production, causing build to fail silently. Also add error
exit on build failure instead of continuing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb CLI always reads API_SECRET from .env instead of stale env vars

Previously mb checked METABOT_AUTH env var first, which could contain
a stale secret injected by PM2. Now it always reads API_SECRET from
.env file, matching the mm CLI behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add description field to bot config

Bots can now have a description in bots.json to document their
capabilities. Shown in mb bots output and POST /api/bots, enabling
agent-to-agent capability discovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address multiple community-reported issues (#29 #30 #31 #32 #33 #34 #36)

- #32/#31: Auto-clear stale session ID when Claude returns "No
  conversation found", so users don't need manual /reset
- #36: Support ANTHROPIC_MODEL env var for third-party API providers
  (falls back: CLAUDE_MODEL → ANTHROPIC_MODEL → claude-opus-4-6)
- #34: Add HTTPS_PROXY support for Telegram file downloads (fixes
  ETIMEDOUT in regions requiring proxy)
- #33: Improve error messages when Feishu bot open_id fetch fails
  (now suggests checking bot capability and app publication)
- #30: Fix Windows install.ps1 writing UTF-8 BOM to .env and
  bots.json (use WriteAllText with BOM-less encoding)
- #29: Add JSON validation after bots.json generation in install.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: support remote URL config for mb/mm CLI tools

CLI tools now read METABOT_URL and MEMORY_SERVER_URL from .env,
enabling cross-machine access to shared MetaBot and MetaMemory instances.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: rename MEMORY_SERVER_URL to META_MEMORY_URL

Unified naming convention. Old MEMORY_SERVER_URL still works as
fallback for backward compatibility in config.ts, mm CLI, and SKILL.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: replace grep -oP with sed for macOS/BSD compatibility

grep -oP (Perl regex) is GNU-only and fails on macOS. Use portable
sed -n 's/^KEY=//p' instead across all CLI tools (mb, mm, fd).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Flood Sung <floodsung@xvirobotics.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention

Group chats with exactly 2 members (1 user + 1 bot) are now treated
like DMs — the bot responds to all messages without requiring @mention.
This lets users "fork" a bot by creating multiple small group chats,
each with its own independent session.

- Add getChatMemberCount() to MessageSender via im.v1.chat.get API
- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members
- Requires im:chat:readonly permission in Feishu app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools from source

The installed CLI tools in ~/.local/bin/ were copies that got out of
sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update pulls latest from GitHub and rebuilds

Previously `mb update` only copied local bin files. Now it does a full
update: git pull → npm install → npm run build → sync CLI tools.
Users can run `mb update` to get the latest release without manual steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update auto-restarts service after pulling latest

Detects running MetaBot process (pm2, tsx dev, or node production)
and restarts it automatically. Sessions and scheduled tasks are
persisted to disk so conversations continue seamlessly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add mb update to CLI tools section in READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: 2-member group detection was broken due to wrong Feishu API field

Feishu im.v1.chat.get returns user_count (string) and bot_count (string),
not member_count. The old code read resp.data.member_count which was
always undefined, so private-like group detection never worked.

npm install without --include=dev skips TypeScript compiler when
NODE_ENV=production, causing build to fail silently. Also add error

refactor: rename MEMORY_SERVER_URL to META_MEMORY_URL (#49)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback

   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

npm install without --include=dev skips TypeScript compiler when
NODE_ENV=production, causing build to fail silently. Also add error
exit on build failure instead of continuing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb CLI always reads API_SECRET from .env instead of stale env vars

Previously mb checked METABOT_AUTH env var first, which could contain
a stale secret injected by PM2. Now it always reads API_SECRET from
.env file, matching the mm CLI behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add description field to bot config

Bots can now have a description in bots.json to document their
capabilities. Shown in mb bots output and POST /api/bots, enabling
agent-to-agent capability discovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address multiple community-reported issues (#29 #30 #31 #32 #33 #34 #36)

- #32/#31: Auto-clear stale session ID when Claude returns "No
  conversation found", so users don't need manual /reset
- #36: Support ANTHROPIC_MODEL env var for third-party API providers
  (falls back: CLAUDE_MODEL → ANTHROPIC_MODEL → claude-opus-4-6)
- #34: Add HTTPS_PROXY support for Telegram file downloads (fixes
  ETIMEDOUT in regions requiring proxy)
- #33: Improve error messages when Feishu bot open_id fetch fails
  (now suggests checking bot capability and app publication)
- #30: Fix Windows install.ps1 writing UTF-8 BOM to .env and
  bots.json (use WriteAllText with BOM-less encoding)
- #29: Add JSON validation after bots.json generation in install.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: support remote URL config for mb/mm CLI tools

CLI tools now read METABOT_URL and MEMORY_SERVER_URL from .env,
enabling cross-machine access to shared MetaBot and MetaMemory instances.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Flood Sung <floodsung@xvirobotics.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

verification.payload:
tree 8f54f66066075b2659d261bf70a62fd5894ef924
parent da5d7157a00db43f732f7ebdc4f2993f658e6ddb
author Flood Sung <floodsung@gmail.com> 1773045602 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1773045602 +0800

feat: remote URL config for CLI tools (#48)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention

Group chats with exactly 2 members (1 user + 1 bot) are now treated
like DMs — the bot responds to all messages without requiring @mention.
This lets users "fork" a bot by creating multiple small group chats,
each with its own independent session.

- Add getChatMemberCount() to MessageSender via im.v1.chat.get API
- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members
- Requires im:chat:readonly permission in Feishu app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools from source

The installed CLI tools in ~/.local/bin/ were copies that got out of
sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update pulls latest from GitHub and rebuilds

Previously `mb update` only copied local bin files. Now it does a full
update: git pull → npm install → npm run build → sync CLI tools.
Users can run `mb update` to get the latest release without manual steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update auto-restarts service after pulling latest

Detects running MetaBot process (pm2, tsx dev, or node production)
and restarts it automatically. Sessions and scheduled tasks are
persisted to disk so conversations continue seamlessly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add mb update to CLI tools section in READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: 2-member group detection was broken due to wrong Feishu API field

Feishu im.v1.chat.get returns user_count (string) and bot_count (string),
not member_count. The old code read resp.data.member_count which was
always undefined, so private-like group detection never worked.

- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention

Group chats with exactly 2 members (1 user + 1 bot) are now treated
like DMs — the bot responds to all messages without requiring @mention.
This lets users "fork" a bot by creating multiple small group chats,
each with its own independent session.

- Add getChatMemberCount() to MessageSender via im.v1.chat.get API
- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members
- Requires im:chat:readonly permission in Feishu app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools from source

The installed CLI tools in ~/.local/bin/ were copies that got out of
sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update pulls latest from GitHub and rebuilds

Previously `mb update` only copied local bin files. Now it does a full
update: git pull → npm install → npm run build → sync CLI tools.
Users can run `mb update` to get the latest release without manual steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update auto-restarts service after pulling latest

Detects running MetaBot process (pm2, tsx dev, or node production)
and restarts it automatically. Sessions and scheduled tasks are
persisted to disk so conversations continue seamlessly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add mb update to CLI tools section in READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: 2-member group detection was broken due to wrong Feishu API field

Feishu im.v1.chat.get returns user_count (string) and bot_count (string),
not member_count. The old code read resp.data.member_count which was
always undefined, so private-like group detection never worked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb update installs devDependencies and stops on build failure

npm install without --include=dev skips TypeScript compiler when
NODE_ENV=production, causing build to fail silently. Also add error
exit on build failure instead of continuing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb CLI always reads API_SECRET from .env instead of stale env vars

Previously mb checked METABOT_AUTH env var first, which could contain
a stale secret injected by PM2. Now it always reads API_SECRET from
.env file, matching the mm CLI behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add description field to bot config

Bots can now have a description in bots.json to document their
capabilities. Shown in mb bots output and POST /api/bots, enabling
agent-to-agent capability discovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address multiple community-reported issues (#29 #30 #31 #32 #33 #34 #36)

- #32/#31: Auto-clear stale session ID when Claude returns "No
  conversation found", so users don't need manual /reset
- #36: Support ANTHROPIC_MODEL env var for third-party API providers
  (falls back: CLAUDE_MODEL → ANTHROPIC_MODEL → claude-opus-4-6)
- #34: Add HTTPS_PROXY support for Telegram file downloads (fixes
  ETIMEDOUT in regions requiring proxy)
- #33: Improve error messages when Feishu bot open_id fetch fails
  (now suggests checking bot capability and app publication)
- #30: Fix Windows install.ps1 writing UTF-8 BOM to .env and
  bots.json (use WriteAllText with BOM-less encoding)
- #29: Add JSON validation after bots.json generation in install.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Flood Sung <floodsung@xvirobotics.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: address multiple community-reported issues (#29 #30 #31 #32 #33 #34 #36)

- #32/#31: Auto-clear stale session ID when Claude returns "No
  conversation found", so users don't need manual /reset
- #36: Support ANTHROPIC_MODEL env var for third-party API providers
  (falls back: CLAUDE_MODEL → ANTHROPIC_MODEL → claude-opus-4-6)
- #34: Add HTTPS_PROXY support for Telegram file downloads (fixes
  ETIMEDOUT in regions requiring proxy)
- #33: Improve error messages when Feishu bot open_id fetch fails
  (now suggests checking bot capability and app publication)
- #30: Fix Windows install.ps1 writing UTF-8 BOM to .env and
  bots.json (use WriteAllText with BOM-less encoding)
- #29: Add JSON validation after bots.json generation in install.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Merge branch 'main' into dev

feat: add description field to bot config (#45)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)

  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

NODE_ENV=production, causing build to fail silently. Also add error
exit on build failure instead of continuing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb CLI always reads API_SECRET from .env instead of stale env vars

Previously mb checked METABOT_AUTH env var first, which could contain
a stale secret injected by PM2. Now it always reads API_SECRET from
.env file, matching the mm CLI behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add description field to bot config

Bots can now have a description in bots.json to document their
capabilities. Shown in mb bots output and POST /api/bots, enabling
agent-to-agent capability discovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Flood Sung <floodsung@xvirobotics.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add description field to bot config

Bots can now have a description in bots.json to document their
capabilities. Shown in mb bots output and POST /api/bots, enabling
agent-to-agent capability discovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Merge branch 'main' into dev

fix: mb CLI auth reads .env instead of stale env vars (#44)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention

Group chats with exactly 2 members (1 user + 1 bot) are now treated
like DMs — the bot responds to all messages without requiring @mention.
This lets users "fork" a bot by creating multiple small group chats,
each with its own independent session.

- Add getChatMemberCount() to MessageSender via im.v1.chat.get API
- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members
- Requires im:chat:readonly permission in Feishu app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools from source

The installed CLI tools in ~/.local/bin/ were copies that got out of
sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update pulls latest from GitHub and rebuilds

Previously `mb update` only copied local bin files. Now it does a full
update: git pull → npm install → npm run build → sync CLI tools.
Users can run `mb update` to get the latest release without manual steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update auto-restarts service after pulling latest

Detects running MetaBot process (pm2, tsx dev, or node production)
and restarts it automatically. Sessions and scheduled tasks are
persisted to disk so conversations continue seamlessly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add mb update to CLI tools section in READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: 2-member group detection was broken due to wrong Feishu API field

Feishu im.v1.chat.get returns user_count (string) and bot_count (string),
not member_count. The old code read resp.data.member_count which was
always undefined, so private-like group detection never worked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb update installs devDependencies and stops on build failure

npm install without --include=dev skips TypeScript compiler when
NODE_ENV=production, causing build to fail silently. Also add error
exit on build failure instead of continuing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: mb CLI always reads API_SECRET from .env instead of stale env vars

Previously mb checked METABOT_AUTH env var first, which could contain
a stale secret injected by PM2. Now it always reads API_SECRET from
.env file, matching the mm CLI behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Flood Sung <floodsung@xvirobotics.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools from source

The installed CLI tools in ~/.local/bin/ were copies that got out of
sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update pulls latest from GitHub and rebuilds

Previously `mb update` only copied local bin files. Now it does a full
update: git pull → npm install → npm run build → sync CLI tools.
Users can run `mb update` to get the latest release without manual steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update auto-restarts service after pulling latest

Detects running MetaBot process (pm2, tsx dev, or node production)
and restarts it automatically. Sessions and scheduled tasks are
persisted to disk so conversations continue seamlessly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add mb update to CLI tools section in READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: 2-member group detection was broken due to wrong Feishu API field

Feishu im.v1.chat.get returns user_count (string) and bot_count (string),
not member_count. The old code read resp.data.member_count which was
always undefined, so private-like group detection never worked.

npm install without --include=dev skips TypeScript compiler when
NODE_ENV=production, causing build to fail silently. Also add error
exit on build failure instead of continuing.

author Flood Sung <floodsung@gmail.com> 1773025805 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1773025805 +0800

fix: mb update installs devDependencies and stops on build failure (#43)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention

Group chats with exactly 2 members (1 user + 1 bot) are now treated
like DMs — the bot responds to all messages without requiring @mention.
This lets users "fork" a bot by creating multiple small group chats,
each with its own independent session.

- Add getChatMemberCount() to MessageSender via im.v1.chat.get API
- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members
- Requires im:chat:readonly permission in Feishu app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools from source

The installed CLI tools in ~/.local/bin/ were copies that got out of
sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update pulls latest from GitHub and rebuilds

Previously `mb update` only copied local bin files. Now it does a full
update: git pull → npm install → npm run build → sync CLI tools.
Users can run `mb update` to get the latest release without manual steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: mb update auto-restarts service after pulling latest

Detects running MetaBot process (pm2, tsx dev, or node production)
and restarts it automatically. Sessions and scheduled tasks are
persisted to disk so conversations continue seamlessly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add mb update to CLI tools section in READMEs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: 2-member group detection was broken due to wrong Feishu API field

Feishu im.v1.chat.get returns user_count (string) and bot_count (string),
not member_count. The old code read resp.data.member_count which was
always undefined, so private-like group detection never worked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
