commit.message:
fix: 2-member group detection was broken due to wrong Feishu API field

Feishu im.v1.chat.get returns user_count (string) and bot_count (string),
not member_count. The old code read resp.data.member_count which was
always undefined, so private-like group detection never worked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Merge branch 'main' into dev

docs: add mb update to CLI tools section in READMEs (#41)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh

- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.

Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

* feat: mb update pulls latest from GitHub and rebuilds

update: git pull → npm install → npm run build → sync CLI tools.

and restarts it automatically. Sessions and scheduled tasks are
persisted to disk so conversations continue seamlessly.

parent b60fd2bddfbbe0780c90e73ba3c289611da07d8b
author Flood Sung <floodsung@gmail.com> 1773024708 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1773024708 +0800

feat: mb update auto-restarts service after pull (#40)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Users can run `mb update` to get the latest release without manual steps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Merge branch 'main' into dev

feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools (#38)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention

Group chats with exactly 2 members (1 user + 1 bot) are now treated
like DMs — the bot responds to all messages without requiring @mention.
This lets users "fork" a bot by creating multiple small group chats,
each with its own independent session.

- Add getChatMemberCount() to MessageSender via im.v1.chat.get API
- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members
- Requires im:chat:readonly permission in Feishu app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add mb update command to sync CLI tools from source

The installed CLI tools in ~/.local/bin/ were copies that got out of
sync with source. Add `mb update` subcommand and `npm run update-cli`
to copy latest bin/* to ~/.local/bin/. Also remove the sed-based
secret injection from install.sh since bin/mb already reads .env
at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Flood Sung <floodsung@xvirobotics.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention

Group chats with exactly 2 members (1 user + 1 bot) are now treated
like DMs — the bot responds to all messages without requiring @mention.
This lets users "fork" a bot by creating multiple small group chats,
each with its own independent session.

- Add getChatMemberCount() to MessageSender via im.v1.chat.get API
- Add member count cache (5-min TTL) in event-handler to avoid excessive API calls
- Bypass @mention check when group has only 2 members
- Requires im:chat:readonly permission in Feishu app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: default sendCards to true for mb task

Previously `mb task` ran silently without posting to Feishu chat.
Change the default so task results are always shown in the chat,
matching user expectations. Explicit `sendCards: false` still works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main' into dev

feat: auto-reply in 2-member group chats without @mention (#35)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

author Flood Sung <floodsung@gmail.com> 1772785039 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1772785039 +0800

fix: split long text_run to avoid Feishu 400 errors (#26)

* Add recurring cron-based scheduled tasks

Support recurring tasks using standard 5-field cron expressions
(e.g. "0 8 * * 1-5" for weekdays at 8am). Features include:

- Cron expression validation and next-occurrence calculation
- Timezone support (default: Asia/Shanghai, configurable via SCHEDULE_TIMEZONE)
- Pause/resume/cancel lifecycle for recurring tasks
- Backward-compatible persistence (old format auto-migrated)
- setTimeout overflow handling for delays > 24.8 days
- API: POST cronExpr to /api/schedule, pause/resume endpoints
- CLI: mb schedule cron/pause/resume commands
- 22 new tests (cron-utils + recurring task lifecycle)
- Add "Feature Completion Workflow" rule to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add MetaMemory → Feishu Wiki sync feature

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:
- /sync and /sync status chat commands
- POST/GET /api/sync and POST /api/sync/document API endpoints
- Auto-wired into Feishu bot bridges at startup
- Environment vars: WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED, WIKI_SPACE_NAME, WIKI_SYNC_THROTTLE_MS

Tests: 58 new tests across 3 test files (sync-store, markdown-to-blocks, doc-sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: table rendering and WIKI_SPACE_ID support

- Convert Markdown tables to code blocks instead of Feishu table blocks
  (Feishu documentBlockChildren API doesn't support inline table cell creation)
- Add WIKI_SPACE_ID env var for pre-configured wiki space
- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match
- Better error messages for wiki space permission issues

Tested: full sync of 18 docs + 9 folders to Feishu Wiki space successfully

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix wiki sync: relative links, quote blocks, and double-traversal

- Strip relative URLs in links (Feishu API requires absolute http/https URLs)
- Convert blockquotes to plain text blocks (Feishu API doesn't support bare quote blocks)
- URL-encode link URLs with non-ASCII characters
- Fix double-traversal: filter root-level doc listing to skip subfolder docs
- Add folder_id to DocumentSummary interface
- Remove unused parseTable function
- Add tests for URL encoding and relative link handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up wiki debug scripts and add plan-mode auto-respond

- Remove all wiki debug/test scripts from scripts/ (development-only utilities)
- Auto-respond to ExitPlanMode/EnterPlanMode interactive tools in the SDK
  stream, preventing the agent from hanging when it enters plan mode
- Add drainAutoRespondTools() to StreamProcessor for detecting and
  handling interactive tool pauses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update README: test count to 155, add wiki sync env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove Agent Communication curl examples from README

Agent communication is now handled via the /metabot skill shortcut,
no need to document raw curl commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Windows PowerShell installer and cross-platform improvements

- Add install.ps1: full-featured PowerShell installer matching install.sh
  (phases 0-9: prerequisites, clone, deps, interactive config, skills, PM2)
- Update ecosystem.config.cjs: use path.join() for cross-platform log paths
- Update README.md and README_zh.md with Windows install instructions
- executor.ts cross-platform changes were already on dev branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add MEMORY_SECRET to mm CLI token resolution chain

Token priority is now MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN > MEMORY_TOKEN > MEMORY_SECRET > API_SECRET.
Also always re-resolve from .env to avoid stale MEMORY_AUTH values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: decouple wiki sync & doc reader from chat bot credentials

Add FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID / FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET env vars for a
dedicated Feishu service app used by wiki sync and document reader.
Falls back to the first Feishu bot's credentials if not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Flood Sung <floodsung@xvirobotics.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: split long text_run content to avoid Feishu 400 errors

Feishu API rejects text_run elements exceeding ~500 chars.
Split code blocks and table blocks at line boundaries to stay
within limits.

   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

commit.message:
Add Feishu doc reader, auto wiki sync, plan display, and MetaSkill improvements

Four major upgrades:

1. Feishu Document Reader: New `feishu-doc` skill and `fd` CLI to read
   Feishu/Lark documents as Markdown. API endpoint at GET /api/feishu/document.
   Includes block-to-markdown converter (reverse of markdown-to-blocks).

2. Auto Wiki Sync: MetaMemory changes now auto-sync to Feishu Wiki with
   5-second debounce. Incremental sync for 1-10 docs, full sync fallback
   for bulk changes. New EventEmitter-based memory-events module.

3. Plan Mode Display: When Claude exits plan mode, the plan file content
   is automatically sent to the Feishu user as a separate card message.
   StreamProcessor tracks plan file paths from Write tool calls.

4. MetaSkill Improvements: Removed redundant tech-lead sub-agent (CLAUDE.md
   is the orchestrator). Added MetaMemory integration for cross-session
   shared knowledge in generated agent teams.

Bug fixes:
- Auto-detect Claude binary path via `which claude` instead of hardcoded path
- Fix bot registry name collision when Feishu and Telegram bots share names
  (use platform:name keys, add getByPlatform/listByPlatform methods)
- Add Telegram video/audio/voice/animation message handlers

Also updates: install.sh (feishu-doc skill + fd CLI), .env.example (all
current config options), README.md, README_zh.md, and CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implements one-way sync from MetaMemory documents to a Feishu Wiki space.
The folder tree maps to wiki nodes; each document becomes a Feishu docx page
with Markdown-to-blocks conversion. Content hash comparison enables incremental sync.

New modules:
- src/sync/doc-sync.ts — Core sync service (syncAll, syncDocument)
- src/sync/sync-store.ts — SQLite persistence for sync mappings
- src/sync/markdown-to-blocks.ts — Markdown → Feishu block converter

Integration:

- Improve ensureWikiSpace() to use first available space when name doesn't match

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix metabot CLI failing to start from outside project directory (#17)

PM2 ecosystem config used a relative interpreter path
(node_modules/.bin/tsx) which only resolved when cwd happened to
be the metabot directory. Use path.join(__dirname, ...) to build
an absolute path so `metabot start` works from any directory.

Co-authored-by: Flood Sung <floodsung@xvirobotics.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remove bot-level auth (allowAll, authorizedUserIds, authorizedChatIds)

Access control is handled at the platform level (Feishu app visibility,
Telegram group membership). The MetaBot-level auth layer was redundant
and caused confusion when new installs silently rejected all messages.

commit.message:
Change allowAll default to true for bots.json mode

Bot-level auth is unnecessary when Feishu/Telegram already handle
access control. The deny-by-default behavior caused new installs
to silently reject all messages. Now bots.json entries default to
allowAll=true, matching single-bot env mode behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
install.sh: add sudo fallback for global npm installs

npm install -g fails with EACCES when Node.js is installed system-wide
(e.g. via NodeSource apt). Now tries without sudo first, then falls
back to sudo for PM2 and Claude CLI global installs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

readme_html:
MetaBot

Infrastructure for building a supervised, self-improving agent organization.

English | 中文

Why

Claude Code is the most capable AI coding agent — but it's trapped in your laptop terminal.

MetaBot sets it free. It gives every agent a Claude Code brain, persistent shared memory, the ability to create new agents, and a communication bus. All accessible from Feishu or Telegram on your phone.

We built MetaBot to run XVI Robotics as an agent-native company — a small team of humans supervising an organization of self-improving AI agents. This is the infrastructure that makes it possible.

How It Works

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                       MetaBot                            │
│                                                          │
│  ┌──────────┐ ┌───────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌───────────┐  │
│  │ MetaSkill│ │MetaMemory │ │IM Bridge │ │ Scheduler │  │
│  │  Agent   │ │  Shared   │ │ Feishu + │ │   Cron    │  │
│  │ Factory  │ │ Knowledge │ │ Telegram │ │   Tasks   │  │
│  └────┬─────┘ └─────┬─────┘ └────┬─────┘ └─────┬─────┘  │
│       └──────────────┴────────────┴─────────────┘        │
│                       ↕                                  │
│            Claude Code Agent SDK                         │
│         (bypassPermissions, streaming)                   │
│                       ↕                                  │
│             HTTP API (:9100) — Agent Bus                 │
│        task delegation · bot CRUD · scheduling           │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Three pillars of a self-improving agent organization:

Pillar Component What it does
Supervised IM Bridge Real-time streaming cards show every tool call. Humans see everything agents do. Access control via Feishu/Telegram platform settings.
Self-Improving MetaMemory Shared knowledge store. Agents write what they learn, other agents retrieve it. The organization gets smarter every day without retraining.
Agent Organization MetaSkill + Scheduler + Agent Bus One command generates a full agent team. Agents delegate tasks to each other. Scheduled tasks run autonomously. Agents can create new agents.

Core Components

Component Description
Claude Code Kernel Every bot is a full Claude Code instance — Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep, WebSearch, MCP, and more. bypassPermissions mode for autonomous operation.
MetaSkill Agent factory. /metaskill ios app generates a complete .claude/ agent team (orchestrator + specialists + code-reviewer) after researching best practices. Uses MetaMemory for shared knowledge across agents.
MetaMemory Embedded SQLite knowledge store with full-text search and Web UI. Agents read/write Markdown documents across sessions. Shared by all agents. Auto-syncs to Feishu Wiki when changes occur (debounced).
Feishu Doc Reader Read Feishu documents and wiki pages as Markdown. fd read <url> from CLI, or Claude auto-reads when users share Feishu URLs. Available as the feishu-doc skill.
IM Bridge Chat with any agent from Feishu/Lark or Telegram (including mobile). Streaming cards with color-coded status and tool call tracking.
Agent Bus REST API on port 9100. Agents delegate tasks to each other via curl. Create/remove bots at runtime. Exposed as the /metabot skill — loaded on demand, not injected into every prompt.
Task Scheduler One-time delays and recurring cron jobs. 0 8 * * 1-5 = weekday 8am news briefing. Timezone-aware (default: Asia/Shanghai). Persists across restarts, auto-retries when busy.
CLI Tools metabot, mm, mb, and fd commands installed to ~/.local/bin/. metabot update to pull/rebuild/restart. mm for MetaMemory, mb for Agent Bus, fd for Feishu docs.

Install

Linux / macOS:

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xvirobotics/metabot/main/install.sh | bash

Windows (PowerShell):

irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xvirobotics/metabot/main/install.ps1 | iex

The installer walks you through: working directory → Claude auth → IM credentials → auto-start with PM2.

Windows notes: The PowerShell installer auto-detects winget/choco/scoop for Node.js installation. CLI tools (mm, mb, metabot, fd) are installed with .cmd wrappers and require Git for Windows (provides Git Bash).

git clone https://github.com/xvirobotics/metabot.git
cd metabot && npm install
cp bots.example.json bots.json   # edit with your bot configs
cp .env.example .env              # edit global settings
npm run dev

Prerequisites: Node.js 20+, Claude Code CLI installed and authenticated. Works on Linux, macOS, and Windows.

Quick Setup

Telegram (30 seconds):

  1. Message @BotFather → /newbot → copy token
  2. Add to bots.json → done (long polling, no webhooks)

Feishu/Lark:

  1. Create app at open.feishu.cn → add Bot capability
  2. Enable permissions: im:message, im:message:readonly, im:resource, docx:document:readonly, wiki:wiki (for doc reading & wiki sync)
  3. Start MetaBot, then enable persistent connection + im.message.receive_v1 event
  4. Publish the app

What You Can Build

  • Solo AI developer — full Claude Code from your phone, bound to your project
  • Multi-agent team — frontend bot, backend bot, infra bot, each in their own workspace, talking via the Agent Bus
  • Self-growing organization — a manager bot that creates new agents on demand, assigns tasks, schedules follow-ups
  • Autonomous research pipeline — agents that search, analyze, save findings to MetaMemory, and schedule next steps

Configuration

bots.json — define your bots:

{
  "feishuBots": [{
    "name": "metabot",
    "feishuAppId": "cli_xxx",
    "feishuAppSecret": "...",
    "defaultWorkingDirectory": "/home/user/project"
  }],
  "telegramBots": [{
    "name": "tg-bot",
    "telegramBotToken": "123456:ABC...",
    "defaultWorkingDirectory": "/home/user/project"
  }]
}
Field Required Default Description
name Yes — Bot identifier
defaultWorkingDirectory Yes — Working directory for Claude
feishuAppId / feishuAppSecret Feishu — Feishu app credentials
telegramBotToken Telegram — Telegram bot token
maxTurns / maxBudgetUsd No unlimited Execution limits
model No SDK default Claude model
Variable Default Description
BOTS_CONFIG — Path to bots.json
API_PORT 9100 HTTP API port
API_SECRET — Bearer token auth
MEMORY_ENABLED true Enable MetaMemory
MEMORY_PORT 8100 MetaMemory port
MEMORY_SECRET API_SECRET MetaMemory auth (legacy)
MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN — Admin token (full access, sees all folders)
MEMORY_TOKEN — Reader token (shared folders only)
FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_ID — Feishu service app for wiki sync & doc reader (falls back to first bot)
FEISHU_SERVICE_APP_SECRET — Feishu service app secret
WIKI_SYNC_ENABLED true Enable MetaMemory→Wiki sync
WIKI_SPACE_ID — Feishu Wiki space ID
WIKI_SPACE_NAME MetaMemory Feishu Wiki space name
WIKI_AUTO_SYNC true Auto-sync on MetaMemory changes (debounced)
WIKI_AUTO_SYNC_DEBOUNCE_MS 5000 Debounce delay for auto-sync
CLAUDE_EXECUTABLE_PATH auto-detect Path to claude binary (resolved via which if not set)
METABOT_URL http://localhost:9100 MetaBot API URL (for CLI remote access)
META_MEMORY_URL http://localhost:8100 MetaMemory server URL (for CLI remote access)
LOG_LEVEL info Log level

MetaBot supports any Anthropic-compatible API:

ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://api.moonshot.ai/anthropic    # Kimi/Moonshot
ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic   # DeepSeek
ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic       # GLM/Zhipu
ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=your-key

Security

MetaBot runs Claude Code in bypassPermissions mode — no interactive approval. Understand the implications:

  • Claude has full read/write/execute access to the working directory
  • Control access via Feishu/Telegram platform settings (app visibility, group membership)
  • Use maxBudgetUsd to cap cost per request
  • API_SECRET enables Bearer auth on both the API server and MetaMemory
  • MetaMemory supports folder-level ACL: set MEMORY_ADMIN_TOKEN and MEMORY_TOKEN for dual-role access. Admin sees all folders; reader only sees folders with visibility: shared. Use PUT /api/folders/:id with {"visibility":"private"} to lock a folder

Chat Commands

Command Description
/reset Clear session
/stop Abort current task
/status Session info
/memory list Browse knowledge tree
/memory search <query> Search knowledge base
/sync Sync MetaMemory to Feishu Wiki
/sync status Show wiki sync status
/help Show help
/metaskill ... Generate agent teams, agents, or skills
/metabot Agent bus, scheduling, and bot management API docs (loaded on demand)
/anything Any unrecognized command is forwarded to Claude Code as a skill

API Reference

Method Path Description
GET /api/health Health check
GET /api/bots List bots
POST /api/bots Create bot at runtime
GET /api/bots/:name Get bot details
DELETE /api/bots/:name Remove bot
POST /api/tasks Delegate task to a bot
POST /api/schedule Schedule one-time or recurring (cron) task
GET /api/schedule List scheduled tasks (one-time + recurring)
PATCH /api/schedule/:id Update a scheduled task
DELETE /api/schedule/:id Cancel scheduled task
POST /api/schedule/:id/pause Pause a recurring task
POST /api/schedule/:id/resume Resume a paused recurring task
POST /api/sync Trigger MetaMemory → Wiki sync
GET /api/sync Wiki sync status
POST /api/sync/document Sync single document by ID
GET /api/feishu/document Read a Feishu document as Markdown
GET /api/stats Cost & usage stats (per-bot, per-user)
GET /api/metrics Prometheus metrics endpoint

CLI Tools

The installer places metabot, mm, mb, and fd (Feishu bots only) executables in ~/.local/bin/ (Linux/macOS) or %USERPROFILE%\.local\bin\ with .cmd wrappers (Windows) — available immediately.

# MetaBot management
metabot update                      # pull latest, rebuild, restart
metabot start                       # start with PM2
metabot stop                        # stop
metabot restart                     # restart
metabot logs                        # view live logs
metabot status                      # PM2 process status

# MetaMemory — read
mm search "deployment guide"        # full-text search
mm list                             # list documents
mm folders                          # folder tree
mm path /projects/my-doc            # get doc by path

# MetaMemory — write
echo '# Notes' | mm create "Title" --folder ID --tags "dev"
echo '# Updated' | mm update DOC_ID
mm mkdir "new-folder"               # create folder
mm delete DOC_ID                    # delete document

# Feishu Document Reader (Feishu bots only)
fd read <feishu-url>                # read document by URL (docx or wiki)
fd read-id <docId>                  # read document by ID
fd info <feishu-url>                # get document metadata

# Agent Bus
mb bots                             # list all bots
mb task <bot> <chatId> <prompt>     # delegate task
mb schedule list                    # list scheduled tasks
mb schedule cron <bot> <chatId> '<cron>' <prompt>  # recurring task
mb schedule pause <id>              # pause recurring task
mb schedule resume <id>             # resume recurring task
mb stats                            # cost & usage stats
mb health                           # status check
mb update                           # pull + rebuild + restart (one command)

Remote Access

CLI tools (mb, mm) can connect to a remote MetaBot/MetaMemory server. Add the URLs to your local .env file:

# In ~/.metabot/.env or ~/metabot/.env
METABOT_URL=http://your-server:9100      # mb commands target this server
META_MEMORY_URL=http://your-server:8100 # mm commands target this server
API_SECRET=your-secret                    # shared auth token

This allows multiple machines to share the same MetaBot and MetaMemory instance — local bots can delegate tasks to a remote agent bus, and any machine can read/write shared memory.

Development

npm run dev          # Hot-reload dev server (tsx)
npm test             # Run tests (vitest, 155 tests)
npm run lint         # ESLint check
npm run format       # Prettier format
npm run build        # TypeScript compile to dist/

Production

metabot start                       # or: pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
metabot update                      # pull + rebuild + restart
pm2 startup && pm2 save             # auto-start on boot

FAQ

No public IP needed? — Correct. Feishu uses WebSocket, Telegram uses long polling.

Non-Claude models? — Yes. Any Anthropic-compatible API (Kimi, DeepSeek, GLM, etc.)

Agent communication? — Currently synchronous request-response. Async bidirectional protocols are on the roadmap.

About

MetaBot is built by XVI Robotics, where we develop humanoid robot brains. We use MetaBot internally to run our company as an agent-native organization — a small team of humans supervising self-improving AI agents. We open-sourced it because we believe this is how companies will work in the future.

Star History

License

MIT
